items.title: Base Endurance Run
items.description: Run 8 km at a pace of 6:30 min/km. Maintain a heart rate in Zone 2 (130-145 bpm). Focus on keeping a steady rhythm and breathing.

items.title: Strength Training Session
items.description: Full-body strength training focusing on core and leg exercises. Include 3 sets of 10-12 reps for squats, lunges, and deadlifts. Rest 60 seconds between sets.

items.title: Interval Training
items.description: Warm up for 10 minutes, then perform 5x800m intervals at 5:00 min/km pace with 3 minutes recovery jog between each interval. Cool down for 10 minutes.

items.title: Recovery Run
items.description: Run 5 km at an easy pace of 7:00 min/km. Keep your heart rate in Zone 1 (below 130 bpm) to aid recovery.
